subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee rest My glory and My loving-kindness. In this very moment one of My branches hath appeared before Me, he who is named Ḍíyá' [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی و عنایتی قد حضر فی هذالحین احد اغصانی الذی سمی بضیاء فی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
